message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state — prune Feb 16 snapshots, add Feb 17

Rotates br_history JSONL snapshots: removes 65 superseded Feb 16
snapshots and adds 67 new Feb 17 snapshots reflecting current issue
tracker state after the parking_lot migration and raptorq work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
